name: prd-pr-copilot
description: Copilot CLI variant of the workshop dev workflow — orchestrator skill plus helper subagents (code-explorer, code-architect, plan-reviewer, impl-backend, impl-frontend, impl-simplify, test-plan-walker) and the supporting skill suite, including end-to-end test-plan walkthrough that runs in a clean subagent context and embeds agent-browser screenshots into the PR description. Agents use Copilot's .agent.md format.
